_meta.description: Blank cells tagged by WHERE the real figure lives, so the grid is honest about availability (Neha, 2026-06-14): 'In NL return' = statutory figure in the insurer's IRDAI NL public-disclosure filing (the agent now pulls it — pending the next run); 'Ind-AS only' = IFRS-basis figure in the Ind-AS statements, not the IGAAP NL return; 'Broker note' = analyst coverage, not a filing. Grey; never a fake value; each fills when a real value lands. | 2026-06-16: cells with NO value in the shared template AND no external source are tagged 'Source unknown — no value in Excel'; cells whose value IS in the template keep their source tag.

icici-lombard::gwp::as_on_run_date.reason: Gross written premium for ICICI Lombard as_on_run_date is a statutory figure in the insurer's IRDAI NL public-disclosure return (NL-1 Revenue Account for premiums, NL-2 P&L for profit, the balance sheet for net worth/solvency). The agent now reads that filing — it fills on the next scheduled or dispatched run.

icici-lombard::net_worth_ifrs::as_on_run.reason: Ifrs net worth for ICICI Lombard as_on_run_date is an Ind-AS (IFRS-basis) figure — it's in the insurer's Ind-AS financial statements, NOT the IGAAP NL return. Reported by the listed insurers (Niva Bupa, Star Health); unlisted insurers file IGAAP only.

icici-lombard::pat_ifrs::as_on_run_date.reason: Ifrs profit after tax for ICICI Lombard as_on_run_date is an Ind-AS (IFRS-basis) figure — it's in the insurer's Ind-AS financial statements, NOT the IGAAP NL return. Reported by the listed insurers (Niva Bupa, Star Health); unlisted insurers file IGAAP only.

godigit::pat_igaap::as_on_run_date.reason: Igaap profit after tax for Go Digit as_on_run_date is a statutory figure in the insurer's IRDAI NL public-disclosure return (NL-1 Revenue Account for premiums, NL-2 P&L for profit, the balance sheet for net worth/solvency). The agent now reads that filing — it fills on the next scheduled or dispatched run.
